sentence: O cielo no ye claro hue.
ipa: ˈo ˈθjelo ˈno ˈʝe ˈklaɾo ˈwe
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Western High-Aragonese distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] and Ĕ>ie 'cielo' per kuhn1935; copula 'ye' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Estos zapatos cuestan cuaranta euros.
ipa: ˈestos θaˈpatos kweˈstan kwaˈɾanta ˈewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: ⟨z⟩ [θ] distinción and Ŏ>ue 'cuestan' per kuhn1935; ⟨s⟩+voiced onset sandhi per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Quiero fablar con o mío bezín.
ipa: ˈkjeɾo faˈblaɾ ˈkon ˈo ˈmio beˈθin
gloss_en: I want to speak with my neighbour.
notes: Final ⟨r⟩ of the infinitive PRESERVED 'fablar' [faˈblaɾ] (contra Ansotano deletion) and F- retained per kuhn1935; 'bezín' (neighbour) per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: O peixe d'o río yera fresco.
ipa: ˈo ˈpejʃe ˈð ˈo ˈrio ˈʝeɾa ˈfɾesko
gloss_en: The river fish was fresh.
notes: Western ⟨ix⟩ [ʃ] realised without the eastern palatal glide 'peixe' [ˈpejʃe] per kuhn1935; clitic ⟨d'⟩ and imperfect 'yera' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Ves de frente y tuerce en a primera carrera.
ipa: ˈbes ˈde ˈfɾente ˈʝ ˈtweɾθe ˈen ˈa pɾiˈmeɾa kaˈreɾa
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn at the first street.
notes: F- retained 'frente' and Ŏ>ue with distinción 'tuerce' per kuhn1935; 'carrera' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: A carne d'aquel puesto yera buena.
ipa: ˈa ˈkaɾne ˈð aˈkel ˈpwesto ˈʝeɾa ˈbwena
gloss_en: The meat from that place was good.
notes: Ŏ>ue 'puesto','buena' and imperfect 'yera' per kuhn1935; clitic ⟨d'⟩ elision per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Án ye a clau d'o coche?
ipa: ˈan ˈʝe ˈa ˈklaw ˈð ˈo ˈkotʃe
gloss_en: Where is the car key?
notes: Interrogative 'án' and 'clau' (key) per kuhn1935; ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'coche' and clitic ⟨d'⟩ per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Cuántas presonas bienen a cenar?
ipa: ˈkuantas pɾeˈsonas bjeˈnen ˈa θeˈnaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Ĕ>ie 'bienen' and distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cenar' per kuhn1935; count question per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Si yo podese, mercarba aquella casa.
ipa: ˈsi ˈʝo poˈðese meˈɾkaɾba aˈkeʎa ˈkasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Aragonese conditional -arba 'mercarba' per kuhn1935; 'mercar' (to buy) per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Ahiere merqué cinco quilos de cereixas.
ipa: aˈjeɾe meˈɾke ˈθinko ˈkilos ˈde θeˈɾejʃas
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cinco' and Western ⟨ix⟩ [ʃ] 'cereixas' [θeˈɾejʃas] per kuhn1935; preterite 'merqué' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Boi ta Echo a mercar peixe.
ipa: ˈboj ˈta ˈetʃo ˈa meˈɾkaɾ ˈpejʃe
gloss_en: I am going to Hecho to buy fish.
notes: Western ⟨ix⟩ [ʃ] 'peixe' and infinitive final ⟨r⟩ kept 'mercar' [meɾˈkaɾ] per kuhn1935; directional 'ta' and 'boi' (I go) per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Truca-me cuando plegues ta casa.
ipa: ˈtɾuka ˈme ˈkwando ˈpleɡes ˈta ˈkasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: 'trucar','plegar' [ˈpleɡes] per kuhn1935; ⟨gu⟩ [ɡ] before front vowel per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Buenos diyas, cómo te ba?
ipa: ˈbwenos diˈʝas ˈkomo ˈte ˈba
gloss_en: Good morning, how are you?
notes: Ŏ>ue 'buenos' and 'diya' (day) per kuhn1935; greeting register per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Más bale paxaro en man que ciento bolando.
ipa: ˈmas ˈbale paˈʃaɾo ˈen ˈman ˈke ˈθjento boˈlando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'paxaro' and distinción ⟨ci⟩ [θ] Ĕ>ie 'ciento' per kuhn1935; proverb per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: A muller biella pilla l'agulla amariella.
ipa: ˈa muˈʎeɾ ˈbjeʎa ˈpiʎa ˈl ˈaɡʎa amaˈɾjeʎa
gloss_en: The old woman picks up the yellow needle.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] preserved 'muller','biella','pilla','agulla' and Ĕ>ie per kuhn1935; clitic ⟨l'⟩ per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: O can corre por a ribera d'o río.
ipa: ˈo ˈkan ˈkore ˈpoɾ ˈa riˈβeɾa ˈð ˈo ˈrio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'corre', word-initial [r] 'río' vs tap [ɾ] 'ribera' per kuhn1935; 'can' (dog) per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Feito y güeit fan una ueitena.
ipa: ˈfejto ˈʝ ˈɡweit ˈfan ˈuna weiˈtena
gloss_en: Done, and eight make a set of eight.
notes: F- retained 'feito' and -CT- > -it- 'feito','güeit' per kuhn1935; numeral 'güeit' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: A finestra d'a montaña ye ubierta.
ipa: ˈa fiˈnestɾa ˈð ˈa moˈntaɲa ˈʝe uˈβjeɾta
gloss_en: The mountain window is open.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'montaña' and Ŏ>ie 'ubierta' per kuhn1935; 'finestra' and clitic ⟨d'⟩ per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Plebe muito sobre os campos berdes.
ipa: ˈpleβe ˈmwito ˈsobɾe ˈos ˈkampos ˈbeɾdes
gloss_en: It rains a lot over the green fields.
notes: 'plebe' (rains), 'muito' (< MULTU) per kuhn1935; plural article 'os' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: No creigo que nieve sobre aquel tozal.
ipa: ˈno ˈkɾejɣo ˈke ˈnjeβe ˈsobɾe aˈkel toˈθal
gloss_en: I do not think it will snow over that hill.
notes: Ĕ>ie 'nieve' and 'creigo','tozal' (hill) per kuhn1935; negation frame per nagore_lain2001.
